Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
 Properties of composition

 Contents:
 1. Composition of equivalences
 2. Composition of adjoint equivalences
 3. Composition of faithful 1-cells
 4. Composition of fully faithful 1-cells
 5. Composition of discrete 1-cells
 6. Composition of pseudomonic 1-cells
 7. Composition of Street fibrations
 8. Composition of Street opfibrations
 9. Composition of adjunctions
 *)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.DiscreteMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Composition of equivalences
 *)
Section CompositionEquivalence.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {a b c : B}
          (l₁ : a --> b)
          (l₂ : b --> c)
          (Hl₁ : left_equivalence l₁)
          (Hl₂ : left_equivalence l₂).

  Let r₁ : b --> a := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁.
  Let r₂ : c --> b := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂.

  Let η₁ : invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁.
  Let η₂ : invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂.

  Let ε₁ : invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁.
  Let ε₂ : invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂.

  Let ηc : id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
    := η₁
       • (rinvunitor _
          • (l₁ ◃ η₂)
          • lassociator _ _ _ ▹ r₁)
       • rassociator _ _ _.

  Let εc : r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
    := rassociator _ _ _
       • (r₂ ◃ (lassociator _ _ _
                • (ε₁ ▹ l₂)
                • lunitor _))
       • ε₂.

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
left_equivalence (l₁ · l₂)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
left_equivalence (l₁ · l₂)

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
B ⟦ c, a ⟧
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · ?pr1
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
(λ _ : id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c) ?pr10
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
B ⟦ c, a ⟧
 exact (r₂ · r₁).
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
 exact ηc.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
(λ _ : id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁),
 r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c) ηc
 exact εc.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (r₂ · r₁,, ηc,, εc))
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell
  ((η₁
    • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
        • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
   • rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell η₁
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell η₂

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell η₁
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell η₂
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (r₂ · r₁,, ηc,, εc)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (r₂ · r₁,, ηc,, εc)))
  ((is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp η₁
         (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker r₁
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor l₁)
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker l₁ η₂))
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator l₁ l₂
                  r₂))))
      (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁)
    :
    is_invertible_2cell ηc)
   :
   is_invertible_2cell
     (left_adjoint_unit (r₂ · r₁,, ηc,, εc)))
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
    • (r₂
       ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
          • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell ε₁
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell ε₂

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell ε₁
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₁: left_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_equivalence l₂
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ b, a ⟧
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ c, b ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ a) (l₁ · r₁)
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ b) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ b)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ c)
ηc:= (η₁
 • (((rinvunitor l₁ • (l₁ ◃ η₂))
     • lassociator l₁ l₂ r₂) ▹ r₁))
• rassociator (l₁ · l₂) r₂ r₁: id₁ a ==> l₁ · l₂ · (r₂ · r₁)
εc:= (rassociator r₂ r₁ (l₁ · l₂)
 • (r₂
    ◃ ((lassociator r₁ l₁ l₂ • (ε₁ ▹ l₂))
       • lunitor l₂))) • ε₂: r₂ · r₁ · (l₁ · l₂) ==> id₁ c
is_invertible_2cell ε₂
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.
End CompositionEquivalence.

(**
 2. Composition of adjoint equivalences
 *)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
adjoint_equivalence a c


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
adjoint_equivalence a c

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
left_equivalence (l₁ · l₂)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
left_equivalence l₁
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
left_equivalence l₂

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
left_equivalence l₁
 exact l₁.
  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: adjoint_equivalence a b
l₂: adjoint_equivalence b c
left_equivalence l₂
 exact l₂.
Defined.


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
left_adjoint_equivalence (l₁ · l₂)


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
l₁: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
l₂: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
left_adjoint_equivalence (l₁ · l₂)

  exact (comp_adjequiv (l₁ ,, Hl₁) (l₂ ,, Hl₂)).
Defined.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c: B
∏ (f : adjoint_equivalence a b)
(g : adjoint_equivalence b c),
comp_adjequiv f g =
comp_adjoint_equivalence (pr1 HB) a b c f g


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c: B
∏ (f : adjoint_equivalence a b)
(g : adjoint_equivalence b c),
comp_adjequiv f g =
comp_adjoint_equivalence (pr1 HB) a b c f g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c: B
∏ a : B,
(λ (a0 b : B) (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ g : adjoint_equivalence b c,
 comp_adjequiv f g =
 comp_adjoint_equivalence (pr1 HB) a0 b c f g) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
comp_adjequiv
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) g =
comp_adjoint_equivalence (pr1 HB) x x c
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
comp_adjequiv
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) g =
J_2_0 (pr1 HB)
  (λ (a b : B) (_ : adjoint_equivalence a b),
   ∏ c : B,
   adjoint_equivalence b c → adjoint_equivalence a c)
  (λ (a c : B) (h : adjoint_equivalence a c), h)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) c g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
comp_adjequiv
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) g = g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
pr1
  (comp_adjequiv
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) g) =
pr1 g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
x0: B ⟦ x, c ⟧
isaprop (left_adjoint_equivalence x0)

    exact (isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence _ (pr2 HB)).
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
pr1
  (comp_adjequiv
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) g) =
pr1 g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
id₁ x · pr1 g = pr1 g

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
invertible_2cell (id₁ x · pr1 g) (pr1 g)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
id₁ x · pr1 g ==> pr1 g
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
is_invertible_2cell ?η

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
id₁ x · pr1 g ==> pr1 g
 exact (lunitor (pr1 g)).
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
a, b, c, x: B
g: adjoint_equivalence x c
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor (pr1 g))
 is_iso.
Qed.


(**
 3. Composition of faithful 1-cells
 *)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
faithful_1cell (f · g)


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
faithful_1cell (f · g)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
α₁ = α₂

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
α₁ ▹ f = α₂ ▹ f

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
(α₁ ▹ f) ▹ g = (α₂ ▹ f) ▹ g

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g₂ f g)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
((α₁ ▹ f) ▹ g) • rassociator g₂ f g =
((α₂ ▹ f) ▹ g) • rassociator g₂ f g

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g₂ f g)

    is_iso.
  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
((α₁ ▹ f) ▹ g) • rassociator g₂ f g =
((α₂ ▹ f) ▹ g) • rassociator g₂ f g

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
rassociator g₁ f g • (α₁ ▹ f · g) =
rassociator g₁ f g • (α₂ ▹ f · g)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: faithful_1cell f
Hg: faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α₁, α₂: g₁ ==> g₂
p: α₁ ▹ f · g = α₂ ▹ f · g
rassociator g₁ f g • (α₂ ▹ f · g) =
rassociator g₁ f g • (α₂ ▹ f · g)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 4. Composition of fully faithful 1-cells
 *)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
fully_faithful_1cell (f · g)


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
fully_faithful_1cell (f · g)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
faithful_1cell (f · g)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, a ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)),
∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ f · g = αf

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
faithful_1cell (f · g)
 exact (comp_faithful
             (fully_faithful_1cell_faithful Hf)
             (fully_faithful_1cell_faithful Hg)).
  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, a ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)),
∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ f · g = αf

f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ f · g = αf

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
g₁ ==> g₂
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
(λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ f · g = αf) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
g₁ ==> g₂
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
g₁ · f ==> g₂ · f

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
g₁ · f · g ==> g₂ · f · g

      exact (rassociator _ _ _ • αf • lassociator _ _ _).
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
Hg: fully_faithful_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
(λ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ f · g = αf)
  (fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf
     (fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         use (vcomp_rcancel (lassociator _ _ _)) ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker ;
         rewrite !fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map_eq ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         apply idpath).
Defined.

(**
 5. Composition of conservative 1-cells
 *)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
conservative_1cell (f · g)


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
conservative_1cell (f · g)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell α

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell ((α ▹ f) ▹ g)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
g₁ · f · g ==> g₂ · f · g
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
?α = (α ▹ f) ▹ g
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell ?α

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
g₁ · f · g ==> g₂ · f · g
 exact (rassociator _ _ _ • (α ▹ f · g) • lassociator _ _ _).
  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
(rassociator g₁ f g • (α ▹ f · g))
• lassociator g₂ f g = (α ▹ f) ▹ g
 abstract
      (rewrite !vassocl ;
       rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker ;
       rewrite !vassocr ;
       rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
       apply id2_left).
  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator g₁ f g • (α ▹ f · g))
   • lassociator g₂ f g)
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g₁ f g • (α ▹ f · g))
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator g₂ f g)

α: g₁ ==> g₂

is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g₁ f g • (α ▹ f · g))

g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g₁ f g)
 is_iso.
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
 exact Hα.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: conservative_1cell f
Hg: conservative_1cell g
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, a ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ f · g)
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator g₂ f g)
 is_iso.
Defined.

Hg: discrete_1cell g

(**
 6. Composition of pseudomonic 1-cells
 *)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
pseudomonic_1cell (f · g)


B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
pseudomonic_1cell (f · g)

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
faithful_1cell (f · g)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, a ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)),
is_invertible_2cell αf
→ ∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂,
  is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ f · g = αf

  
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g

Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g

(αf : g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)),

→ ∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂,
  is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ f · g = αf

∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂,
is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ f · g = αf

g₁ ==> g₂

z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)

g₁ · f ==> g₂ · f
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf) • lassociator g₂ f g)

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell
  (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
     ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf) • lassociator g₂ f g)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
           Hαf)
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
 apply is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
(λ α : g₁ ==> g₂,
 is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ f · g = αf)
  (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf
     (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
              Hαf)
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
     (is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
              Hαf)
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g))))
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell
  (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf
     (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
              Hαf)
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
     (is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
              Hαf)
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g))))
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf
  (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
     ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf) • lassociator g₂ f g)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
           Hαf)
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
  (is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
     ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf) • lassociator g₂ f g)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
           Hαf)
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
▹ f · g = αf

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell
  (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf
     (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
              Hαf)
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
     (is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
        ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf)
         • lassociator g₂ f g)
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
              Hαf)
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g))))
 apply is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map.
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
Hg: pseudomonic_1cell g
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
αf: g₁ · (f · g) ==> g₂ · (f · g)
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf
  (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
     ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf) • lassociator g₂ f g)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
           Hαf)
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
  (is_invertible_2cell_pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hg
     ((rassociator g₁ f g • αf) • lassociator g₂ f g)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g₁ f g)
           Hαf)
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator g₂ f g)))
▹ f · g = αf
 abstract
          (use (vcomp_lcancel (rassociator _ _ _)) ; [ is_iso | ] ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
           rewrite !pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map_eq ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           apply idpath).
Defined.

(**
 7. Composition of Street fibrations
 *)
Section CompositionOfSFib.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {a b c : B}
          {f : a --> b}
          {g : b --> c}
          (Hf : internal_sfib f)
          (Hg : internal_sfib g).

  Section CompCartesian.
    Context {z : B}
            {h₁ h₂ : z --> a}
            (α : h₁ ==> h₂)
            (Hα₁ : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α)
            (Hα₂ : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)).

    Section ToCartesianComp.
      Context {k : z --> a}
              {β : k ==> h₂}
              {δp : k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)}
              (q : β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)).

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
(β ▹ f) ▹ g =
((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
• ((α ▹ f) ▹ g)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
(β ▹ f) ▹ g =
((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
• ((α ▹ f) ▹ g)

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
(β ▹ f) ▹ g =
rassociator k f g
• (δp • (lassociator h₁ f g • ((α ▹ f) ▹ g)))

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
lassociator k f g • ((β ▹ f) ▹ g) =
δp • (lassociator h₁ f g • ((α ▹ f) ▹ g))

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
(β ▹ f · g) • lassociator h₂ f g =
δp • (lassociator h₁ f g • ((α ▹ f) ▹ g))

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
(δp • (α ▹ f · g)) • lassociator h₂ f g =
δp • (lassociator h₁ f g • ((α ▹ f) ▹ g))

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
δp • ((α ▹ f · g) • lassociator h₂ f g) =
δp • (lassociator h₁ f g • ((α ▹ f) ▹ g))

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
δp • ((α ▹ f · g) • lassociator h₂ f g) =
δp • ((α ▹ f · g) • lassociator h₂ f g)

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

      Let ζ : k · f ==> h₁ · f
        := is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
             _
             Hα₂
             (β ▹ f)
             (rassociator _ _ _ • δp • lassociator _ _ _)
             to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help.

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
k ==> h₁

  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
k ==> h₁

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B

g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧

z: B

  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
β ▹ f = ζ • (α ▹ f)

        abstract
          (unfold ζ ;
           rewrite is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_comm ;
           apply idpath).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B

β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor ▹ f · g = δp

a, b, c: B

g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧

Hg: internal_sfib g

  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B

β: k ==> h₂

q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor f Hα₁ β
  (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
     ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
     to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_subproof ▹ f · g =
δp

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
rassociator k f g
• (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor f Hα₁ β
     (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
        ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
        to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help)
     to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_subproof
   ▹ f · g) = rassociator k f g • δp

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂

q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
((is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor f Hα₁ β
    (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
       ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
       to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help)
    to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_subproof ▹ f)
 ▹ g) • rassociator h₁ f g = rassociator k f g • δp

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
• rassociator h₁ f g = rassociator k f g • δp

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
rassociator k f g
• (δp • (lassociator h₁ f g • rassociator h₁ f g)) =
rassociator k f g • δp

        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
rassociator k f g • (δp • id₂ (h₁ · (f · g))) =
rassociator k f g • δp

q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)

  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
rassociator k f g • δp = rassociator k f g • δp

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

a, b, c: B

k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ ▹ f = ζ
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)

β: k ==> h₂

ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₁ ▹ f) ▹ g =
(rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g

k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)

α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ ▹ f · g) • lassociator h₁ f g =
δp • lassociator h₁ f g

            
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₂ ▹ f · g = δp

            exact (pr12 φ₂).
          
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
ζ ▹ g = (rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g
 apply is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_over.
          
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ ▹ f) • (α ▹ f) = β ▹ f
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ • α) ▹ f = β ▹ f

            
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
β ▹ f = β ▹ f

            apply idpath.
          
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
ζ • (α ▹ f) = β ▹ f
 apply is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_comm.
        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ • α = β
 exact (pr22 φ₁).
        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
ζ:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor g Hα₂ (β ▹ f)
  ((rassociator k f g • δp) • lassociator h₁ f g)
  to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor_help: k · f ==> h₁ · f
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₂ • α = β
 exact (pr22 φ₂).
      Qed.
    End ToCartesianComp.

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (f · g) α

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
∃! δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
isaprop (∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
isaprop (∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β)
 exact (to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_unique q).
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f α
Hα₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (α ▹ f)
k: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
β: k ==> h₂
δp: k · (f · g) ==> h₁ · (f · g)
q: β ▹ f · g = δp • (α ▹ f · g)
∑ δ : k ==> h₁, δ ▹ f · g = δp × δ • α = β
 exact (to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_factor q
               ,,
               to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_over q
               ,,
               to_is_cartesian_2cell_comp_comm q).
    Defined.
  End CompCartesian.

  Section CompCleaving.
    Context {z : B}
            {h₁ : z --> c}
            {h₂ : z --> a}
            (α : h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)).

    Let ℓ₁ : z --> b
      := pr1 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator _ _ _)).
    Let γ₁ : ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
      := pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator _ _ _)).
    Let β₁ : invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
      := pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator _ _ _)).
    Let Hγ₁ : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
      := pr1 (pr222 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator _ _ _))).
    Let p₁ : γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
      := pr2 (pr222 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator _ _ _))).

    Let ℓ₂ : z --> a
      := pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁).
    Let γ₂ : ℓ₂ ==> h₂
      := pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁).
    Let β₂ : invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
      := pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁).
    Let Hγ₂ : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
      := pr1 (pr222 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)).
    Let p₂ : γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
      := pr2 (pr222 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)).

    Definition comp_sfib_cleaving_lift
      : z --> a
      := ℓ₂.

    Definition comp_sfib_cleaving_cell
      : comp_sfib_cleaving_lift ==> h₂
      := γ₂.

    Definition comp_sfib_cleaving_cell_over_f
      : comp_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
      := p₂.

    Definition comp_sfib_cleaving_cell_g_cartesian
      : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
      := Hγ₁.

    Definition comp_sfib_cleaving_cell_f_cartesian
      : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f comp_sfib_cleaving_cell
      := Hγ₂.

    Definition comp_sfib_cleaving_over
      : invertible_2cell (comp_sfib_cleaving_lift · (f · g)) h₁
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 _
                 β₂))
           β₁.

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (f · g)
  comp_sfib_cleaving_cell

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (f · g)
  comp_sfib_cleaving_cell

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f comp_sfib_cleaving_cell
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g
  (comp_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ f)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f comp_sfib_cleaving_cell
 exact Hγ₂.
      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g
  (comp_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ f)
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g (γ₂ ▹ f)

        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f

            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁

         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)

B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_invertible_2cell β₂

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
 exact Hγ₁.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
comp_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ f · g =
comp_sfib_cleaving_over • α

    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
comp_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ f · g =
comp_sfib_cleaving_over • α

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
γ₂ ▹ f · g =
((lassociator ℓ₂ f g • (β₂ ▹ g)) • β₁) • α

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
γ₂ ▹ f · g =
lassociator ℓ₂ f g • ((β₂ ▹ g) • (β₁ • α))

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
rassociator ℓ₂ f g • (γ₂ ▹ f · g) =
(β₂ ▹ g) • (β₁ • α)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
((γ₂ ▹ f) ▹ g) • rassociator h₂ f g =
(β₂ ▹ g) • (β₁ • α)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
((γ₂ ▹ f) ▹ g) • rassociator h₂ f g = ?b
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
Hf: internal_sfib f
Hg: internal_sfib g
z: B
h₁: B ⟦ z, c ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ z, a ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · (f · g)
ℓ₁:= pr1
  (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f) (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): B ⟦ z, b ⟧
γ₁:= pr12 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
        (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): ℓ₁ ==> h₂ · f
β₁:= pr122 (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
         (α • lassociator h₂ f g)): invertible_2cell (ℓ₁ · g) h₁
Hγ₁:= pr122 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib g γ₁
p₁:= pr222 (pr2
         (pr1 Hg z h₁ (h₂ · f)
            (α • lassociator h₂ f g))): γ₁ ▹ g = β₁ • (α • lassociator h₂ f g)
ℓ₂:= pr1 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): B ⟦ z, a ⟧
γ₂:= pr12 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): ℓ₂ ==> h₂
β₂:= pr122 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁): invertible_2cell (ℓ₂ · f) ℓ₁
Hγ₂:= pr122 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib f γ₂
p₂:= pr222 (pr2 (pr1 Hf z ℓ₁ h₂ γ₁)): γ₂ ▹ f = β₂ • γ₁
?b = (β₂ ▹ g) • (β₁ • α)
